title: AWS Permission Boundary Basics
summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS permission boundaries constrain maximum principal authority without granting access by themselves.
prerequisites: Basic understanding of IAM users, roles, policies, and effective permissions
objectives: Explain what a permission boundary is
Differentiate permission boundaries from identity policies
Explain why boundaries do not grant permissions by themselves
Understand how boundaries reduce privilege-escalation risk
Prepare for Principal LABs involving PassRole, cross-account trust, and role chaining
